headline: HONEYWELL ANNOUNCES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend payment of $1.19 per share on the Company's common stock. The dividend is payable on June 5, 2026, out of surplus to holders of record at the close of business on May 15, 2026.

headline: HONEYWELL ANNOUNCES PARTICIPATION AT WOLFE RESEARCH GLOBAL TRANSPORTATION AND INDUSTRIALS CONFERENCE
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced its participation at Wolfe Research's Global Transportation and Industrials Conference in New York City on Tuesday, May 19, 2026. Mike Stepniak, senior vice president and chief financial officer will present from 8:00 a.m. - 8:30 a.m. EDT.
